prompt:
A small brushed 12 V DC motor shown in close-up on a workshop surface, with its cylindrical metal body, simple shaft, vent slots, and two power terminals clearly visible. A hand-crank generator handle and small test leads nearby suggest human-powered generation experiments rather than automated precision motion.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future maker-energy aesthetic: soft task lighting, realistic metal textures and subtle wear, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the motor centered and uncluttered so it works clearly as a DSPACE electronics inventory icon.
